# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: A new feature
- [ ] fix: A bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation only changes
- [ ] refactor: Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] test: Adding or updating tests
- [ ] build: Changes to build system or external dependencies
- [ ] ci: Changes to CI configuration files and scripts
- [ ] chore: Other changes that don't modify src or test files

## Linked issues

<!-- Link related issues, e.g. "Closes #123", "Refs #456". -->

## Documentation updates

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] ADR added/updated (docs/adr/)
- [ ] SRS updated (docs/srs/)
- [ ] arc42 section(s) updated (docs/arc42/)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] Compliance docs updated (docs/compliance/)

## Testing performed

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them. Include unit, integration, and manual testing where applicable. -->

## Screenshots / recordings (if UI)

<!-- Attach before/after screenshots or short screen recordings for UI changes. -->

## Self-review checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] CI green locally (lint, type-check, unit, integration)
- [ ] Docs updated (see "Documentation updates" above)
- [ ] Commit messages use Conventional Commits format (`type(scope): subject`)
